title: Integration deactivated
excerpt: On boards when i choose the option integrate, it is turned off. I only have the option to duplicate but still all is turned off without any option to activate.

posts.author: MrKt (Diamantis Diamantis)
posts.cookedHtml: On boards when i choose the option integrate, it is turned off. I only have the option to duplicate but still all is turned off without any option to activate.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: This is because you are not a board owner or not the account that created the recipe that is deactivated.
